name: Yang Xiao Long, Dehya: Story | Mercenary of Puns
description:
Whatever story happens between you, Yang and Dehya, it's yours to tell! Create your own scenario, to your heart's content!

Both characters are 18+ same rules apply here.

I decided to go with Dehya for Yang, realizing I don't have a model of Itto on hand, regarding why I didn't use Mavuika. Well, trying to pose her properly with her motorcycle and trying to pose Yang with Bumblebee, it wasn't an easy task. So, scrapped that idea.
creator: Blank_22
